calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l .github/prompts/predict.md AGENTS.md schemas/prediction.schema.json schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272491 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272491 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition -maxdepth 4 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73272491 -maxdepth 5 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json
sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/documents.json
sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/questions-presented.txt
wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt
sed -n '1,800p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/peti

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"REASONS FOR GRANTING|I\\. THE COURT|II\\. THE COURT|None of the Justifications|This Court Must|CONCLUSION|Circuit|courts of appeals|split|vehicle|waiv|forfeiture\" data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '760,1065p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '1055,1350p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|docket|citation|case law|legal/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Second Circuit|paid|fee|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,175p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n 'Second|ca2|paid|Paid|high|salience' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '3520,4025p' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Libretti\" \"Southern Union\" criminal forfeiture jury Sixth Amendment",filed_before:"2026-04-27",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Libretti criminal forfeiture Apprendi",filed_before:"2026-04-27",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition granted --limit 8 --corpus-backend service 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /web search|search the web|internet search|browse/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition denied --limit 12 --corpus-backend service 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Ellingburg United States 18 U.S.C. 982(a)(1) forfeiture criminal punishment",filed_before:"2026-04-27",fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","cluster_id","syllabus"],num_results:5,order_by:"score desc"}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:4554402,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1520,1610p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '2870,3125p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && test ! -e data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z && echo output-path-clear","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort\ngit status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
